creator: x@Vex.Net
text:
The submitted patch won't work, as a lot of files have changed between 
versions. Here's a patch including updated pkg-plist. 

Also in this patch I drop maintainership. I haven't used the bot in over a 
year now....


--- py24-supybot-0.83.2.patch begins here ---
Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/irc/py-supybot/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.5
diff -c -u -r1.5 Makefile
--- Makefile	19 May 2006 14:10:05 -0000	1.5
+++ Makefile	4 Aug 2006 00:14:59 -0000
@@ -2,40 +2,39 @@
 # Date created:		01 March 2004
 # Whom:			Tim Middleton <x@vex.net>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/irc/py-supybot/Makefile,v 1.5 2006/05/19 14:10:05 mnag Exp 
$
+# $FreeBSD: ports/irc/py-supybot/Makefile,v 1.4 2005/04/05 18:22:40 pav Exp $
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	supybot
-PORTVERSION=	0.83.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.83.2
 CATEGORIES=	irc python
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	supybot
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	Supybot-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	x@Vex.Net
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Supybot - A Superb Python IRC bot
 
-USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_PYTHON=	2.3+
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 
 DOCS=	ACKS ChangeLog INSTALL LICENSE README RELNOTES
 
 MANCOMPRESSED=	no
-MAN1=	supybot.1 supybot-adduser.1 supybot-wizard.1 supybot-botchk.1 \
-	supybot-plugin-create.1 supybot-plugin-doc.1
+MAN1=	supybot.1 supybot-adduser.1 supybot-botchk.1 supybot-plugin-create.1 
supybot-plugin-doc.1 supybot-wizard.1
 
 post-install:
-.for f in ${MAN1}
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/docs/man/${f} ${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1
-.endfor
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+.for f in ${MAN1}
+	@${CP} ${WRKSRC}/docs/man/${f} ${PREFIX}/man/man1/
+.endfor
 .for f in ${DOCS}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${f} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${CP} ${WRKSRC}/${f} ${DOCSDIR}/
 .endfor
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/docs/GETTING_STARTED ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${CP} -R ${WRKSRC}/docs/ ${DOCSDIR}/
+	@${RM} -rf ${DOCSDIR}/man
 .endif
 .if !defined(BATCH)
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
